name: Grilled Lemon-Oregano Swordfish Sandwiches w Cucumberyogurt
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh oregano, minced (or 1 teaspoon dried oregano, crumbled)
salt and freshly ground black pepper
1/2 teaspoon minced garlic mashed with 1/4 teaspoon salt
watercress or arugula leaves (washed and dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the grill. Alternatively, the swordfish can be prepared in a hot skillet and cooked for 3 minutes per side.
2. In a shallow dish combine the lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, salt, and pepper with a fork. Place the swordfish in the dish and turn to coat with the marinade. Cover and chill while preparing the cucumber sauce.
3. Coarsely shred the cucumber onto a clean cloth and squeeze to extract the liquid. Transfer the cucumber to a bowl and stir in the yogurt, mint, and garlic. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Chill until ready to use.
4. Grill the swordfish for 2 to 3 minutes per side depending on thickness of steak. Transfer each swordfish steak to a roll and top with cucumber sauce and watercress or arugula. Garnish with lemon wedges.
5. Yield: 2 sandwiches
